<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Rasbreeder – Sementes de Coleção</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  :root {
    --green-deep: #1a3d2b;
    --green-mid: #2d6a4f;
    --green-light: #52b788;
    --cream: #f5f0e8;
    --cream-dark: #ede5d0;
    --amber: #c8963e;
    --amber-light: #e8b96a;
    --text-dark: #1a1a1a;
    --text-muted: #5a5a4a;
  }
  body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; background: var(--cream); color: var(--text-dark); min-height: 100vh; }

  nav { background: var(--green-deep); padding: 0 2rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 72px; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; }
  .logo-img { height: 52px; width: 52px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; }
  .logo-text { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.5rem; color: var(--amber-light); letter-spacing: 0.04em; margin-left: 0.7rem; }
  .logo-text span { font-style: italic; color: #fff; }
  .logo-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--amber-light); }
  .cart-btn { background: var(--amber); color: #fff; border: none; padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; transition: background 0.2s; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; }
  .cart-btn:hover { background: var(--amber-light); }

  .hero { background: var(--green-deep); color: #fff; padding: 5rem 2rem 4rem; text-align: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  .hero::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 60% 40%, rgba(82,183,136,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%); }
  .hero-tag { display: inline-block; background: rgba(200,150,62,0.2); color: var(--amber-light); font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.3rem 1rem; border: 1px solid rgba(200,150,62,0.4); border-radius: 2px; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; position: relative; }
  .hero h1 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 4.5rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 1rem; position: relative; }
  .hero h1 em { color: var(--green-light); font-style: italic; }
  .hero p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 300; max-width: 500px; margin: 0 auto 2rem; line-height: 1.7; position: relative; }
  .hero-cta { background: var(--amber); color: #fff; border: none; padding: 0.9rem 2.5rem; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 2px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; position: relative; }
  .hero-cta:hover { background: var(--amber-light); }

  .stats-bar { background: var(--cream-dark); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); display: flex; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .stat-item { padding: 1.2rem 3rem; text-align: center; border-right: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); }
  .stat-item:last-child { border-right: none; }
  .stat-num { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.6rem; color: var(--green-mid); font-weight: 700; }
  .stat-label { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; margin-top: 2px; }

  .section { padding: 4rem 2rem; max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .section-header { display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); padding-bottom: 1rem; }
  .section-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--green-deep); }
  .section-title em { font-style: italic; color: var(--green-mid); }

  .product-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem; }
  .product-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.07); border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; }
  .product-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 10px 32px rgba(26,61,43,0.13); }
  .product-img { width: 100%; height: 220px; object-fit: cover; display: block; }
  .product-body { padding: 1.1rem; }
  .product-name { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--green-deep); margin-bottom: 0.6rem; line-height: 1.35; min-height: 2.7rem; }
  .product-footer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 0.8rem; }
  .product-price { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--green-mid); }
  .add-btn { background: var(--green-deep); color: #fff; border: none; padding: 0.45rem 1rem; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 2px; transition: background 0.2s; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; }
  .add-btn:hover { background: var(--green-mid); }

  .promo-banner { background: var(--green-mid); color: #fff; padding: 3rem 2rem; text-align: center; }
  .promo-banner h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 2rem; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .promo-banner p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .promo-form { display: flex; gap: 0; max-width: 400px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .promo-input { flex: 1; border: none; padding: 0.8rem 1rem; font-size: 0.9rem; outline: none; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; }
  .promo-submit { background: var(--amber); color: #fff; border: none; padding: 0.8rem 1.5rem; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; }

  footer { background: var(--green-deep); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); padding: 3rem 2rem; text-align: center; }
  footer img { height: 60px; width: 60px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  footer p { font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.7; max-width: 400px; margin: 0 auto; }

  .toast { position: fixed; bottom: 2rem; right: 2rem; background: var(--green-deep); color: #fff; padding: 0.9rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.88rem; border-left: 3px solid var(--amber); transform: translateX(200%); transition: transform 0.3s ease; z-index: 999; }
  .toast.show { transform: translateX(0); }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .stat-item { width: 50%; border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <div class="logo-wrap">
    <img class="logo-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Rasbreeder logo">
    <span class="logo-text">Ras<span>breeder</span></span>
  </div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#">Sementes</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">Coleções</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">Raridades</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">Sobre</a></li>
  </ul>
  <button class="cart-btn" onclick="showToast('🛒 Carrinho aberto!')">
    🛒 Carrinho
    <span id="cart-count" style="background:var(--amber-light);color:var(--green-deep);border-radius:50%;width:18px;height:18px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:700;">0</span>
  </button>
</nav>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-tag">🌱 Sementes de coleção premium</div>
  <h1>Cultive algo<br><em>extraordinário</em></h1>
  <p>Variedades raras, exóticas e exclusivas criadas com paixão pela genética. Sementes selecionadas para o colecionador apaixonado.</p>
  <button class="hero-cta" onclick="document.getElementById('catalogo').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">Ver catálogo</button>
</section>

<div class="stats-bar">
  <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num">+500</div><div class="stat-label">Variedades</div></div>
  <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num">12k+</div><div class="stat-label">Clientes</div></div>
  <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num">98%</div><div class="stat-label">Germinação</div></div>
  <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num">6 anos</div><div class="stat-label">No mercado</div></div>
</div>

<div class="section" id="catalogo">
  <div class="section-header">
    <h2 class="section-title">Nossas <em>sementes</em></h2>
  </div>
  <div class="product-grid" id="products"></div>
</div>

<div class="promo-banner">
  <h2>Receba novidades exclusivas</h2>
  <p>Seja o primeiro a saber sobre novas variedades e promoções especiais</p>
  <div class="promo-form">
    <input class="promo-input" type="email" placeholder="seu@email.com">
    <button class="promo-submit">Cadastrar</button>
  </div>
</div>

<footer>
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Rasbreeder">
  <p>Apaixonados por genética rara e sementes de coleção. Cultivando biodiversidade, uma semente de cada vez.</p>
</footer>

<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

<script>
const products = [
  { name: "GPP x Duck x Freakshow by Basinaldo", price: "R$ 99,99", img: "data:image/png;base64," },
  { name: "Skunjack", price: "R$ 99,99", img: "data:image/png;base64," },
  { name: "Pupil Kush", price: "R$ 99,99", img: "data:image/png;base64," },
  { name: "Rainha da Resina", price: "R$ 99,99", img: "data:image/png;base64," },
  { name: "Blue Dreams", price: "R$ 99,99", img: "data:image/png;base64," },
  { name: "2Kush F3", price: "R$ 99,99", img: "data:image/png;base64," },
  { name: "WhiteFields Pupil", price: "R$ 99,99", img: "data:image/png;base64," },
  { name: "Prayer Pupil", price: "R$ 99,99", img: "data:image/png;base64," },
  { name: "24K Gold", price: "R$ 99,99", img: "data:image/png;base64," },
];

let cartCount = 0;
const grid = document.getElementById("products");

products.forEach(p => {
  grid.innerHTML += `
    <div class="product-card">
      <img class="product-img" src="${p.img}" alt="${p.name}">
      <div class="product-body">
        <div class="product-name">${p.name}</div>
        <div class="product-footer">
          <div class="product-price">${p.price}</div>
          <button class="add-btn" onclick="addCart('${p.name}')">+ Adicionar</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
});

function addCart(name) {
  cartCount++;
  document.getElementById("cart-count").textContent = cartCount;
  showToast("✓ " + name + " adicionado!");
}

function showToast(msg) {
  const t = document.getElementById("toast");
  t.textContent = msg;
  t.classList.add("show");
  setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove("show"), 2500);
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
